final_prompt.prompt:
Create a technical instructional illustration showing how to deploy hermes in a docker container and integrate glmcodingplan, with clearly labeled step-by-step panels.

Style/medium: needs a clean technical-diagram / infographic aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a multi-panel layout with clearly numbered steps 1, 2, 3, 4 in sequence
Subject: must include all 4 deployment steps:
  Step 1: docker 环境准备 / 拉取 hermes 镜像
  Step 2: 启动 docker 容器 / 配置参数
  Step 3: 接入 glmcodingplan / 配置连接
  Step 4: 验证部署 / 运行测试
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a technical / developer-tool direction — exact color scheme is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step labels "1" "2" "3" "4", component labels "hermes", "docker", "glmcodingplan"
Constraints: must preserve clear visual separation between each numbered step; each panel must show relevant UI / terminal / diagram elements illustrating that step
Avoid: must avoid decorative clutter that obscures the technical steps
